description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a predominantly black finish and a compact, streamlined design. The rifle features a red accent on the pistol grip and magazine, adding a striking visual contrast to the otherwise dark body. It is equipped with a mounted optical sight on the top rail, suggesting enhanced aiming capabilities for urban or close-quarters scenarios. The barrel is long and slender, with a squared-off handguard and a flat muzzle, lacking any visible muzzle device. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, typical of contemporary firearms designed for durability and reduced weight. The rifle's ergonomic grip and trigger guard are clearly defined, and the magazine is detachable, indicating rapid reload functionality.
description: A sleek, black tactical rifle with a red-accented grip and magazine, featuring a mounted optical sight and a long, flat-barreled design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, red grip and magazine, and mounted sight clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow profile of the barrel and the circular muzzle opening, with the sight's lens visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the rifle's symmetry, red grip and magazine, and the mounted sight from a different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the stock, the sight's rear, and the overall slimness of the rifle.
